prompt: Tap right hole card (Ks) for tournament-pressure balance input.
why_v1: A second hole-card anchor keeps the tournament read stable before the final action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Ks is the hole-card anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the high-card cue that keeps the hand's pressure balance honest.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the king of spades because the second high card completes the hand's tournament-pressure balance and shows whether the hand still has enough playability to continue.
